papers.title: WT-UMI: Tactile-based Whole-Body Manipulation via Force-Supervised Contact-Aware Planning
Proprioceptive-visual correspondence enables self-other distinction in humanoid robots
papers.summary: 论文提出通过本体感觉-视觉对应学习实现人形机器人自我-他者区分，无需身份标签或运动学模型即可建立预测性自我模型，实现三维身体占据感知。

papers.title: GenHOI: Contact-Aware Humanoid-Object Interaction by Imitating Generated Videos without Task-Specific Training
papers.summary: GenHOI提出一种零样本人形机器人-物体交互框架，通过生成视频结合接触感知和几何约束优化，无需任务特定训练即可实现多样化的物体交互任务。

papers.title: Critic Architecture Matters: Dual vs. Unified Critics for Humanoid Loco-Manipulation
papers.summary: 论文通过在Unitree G1人形机器人上的对照实验，首次系统证明双评论家架构在多目标强化学习中显著优于统一评论家，目标达成速度提升3.5倍。

papers.title: EM-Fall: Embodied mmWave Sensing for Day-and-Night Fall Detection on Humanoid Robots
papers.summary: 本文提出EM-Fall框架，通过将毫米波传感集成到移动人形机器人中，实现主动调整感知视角的 embodied 跌倒检测，解决传统方案在遮挡和低光照环境下性能下降的问题。

companyNews.title: Boston Dynamics’ Atlas Robot Learns Soccer and It’s Both Impressive and Slightly Terrifying - GeekTyrant
companyNews.summary: Atlas机器人展示踢足球技能，体现运动控制与平衡能力新突破，推动人形机器人向类人运动智能演进。

companyNews.title: The Beautiful Game: How Hyundai Motor and Boston Dynamics Taught a Robot to Play Football - Hyundai
companyNews.summary: 现代汽车与波士顿动力合作，让机器人学会踢足球，展示人形机器人在动态运动控制和协调方面的技术进步，为未来服务、娱乐机器人应用奠定基础。

companyNews.title: Figure AI founder Brett Adcock has shared a video showing a group of humanoid robots undergoing what he described as “head testing,” offering a glimpse into the company's ongoing efforts to improve the durability and reliability of its robots. In a post on X, A - instagram.com
companyNews.summary: Figure AI发布视频展示机器人“头部测试”，彰显其对产品耐久性与可靠性的重视，推动人形机器人向实用化迈进一步。

companyNews.title: Unitree Robotics' IPO countdown is on! Unraveling the complexities of the "first humanoid robot stock's" prospectus. - PANews
companyNews.summary: Unitree Robotics启动IPO流程，有望成为全球首个人形机器人上市公司，其

companyNews.title: Cheapest Humanoid Robots 2026: Prices From $1,400 - Robozaps
companyNews.summary: 2026年Unitree Robotics推出最便宜人形机器人，价格仅$1,400起，标志着消费级人形机器人价格门槛大幅降低，行业竞争加剧。
